# .github

## Purpose
Container directory for GitHub Actions CI/CD workflows.

## Key Files
| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `workflows/ci.yml` | Main continuous integration workflow |

## Subdirectories
| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `workflows/` | GitHub Actions workflow definitions |

## For AI Agents

### Working In This Directory
- Ensure workflows are valid YAML.
- Workflows here dictate the automated CI checks for the monorepo.
